name: MAX7219 Digit Display
description: The `max7219` display platform allows you to use MAX7219 digit with ESPHome. Please note that this component is *only* for the digit "matrix" display, for the 7 segment display see [Max7219](https://esphome.io/components/display/max7219/).

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `1s`.

config_entries.label: CS Pin
config_entries.description: The pin you have the CS line hooked up to.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: SPI ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [SPI Component](https://esphome.io/components/spi) if you want to use multiple SPI buses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Chip Lines Style
config_entries.description: How are the lines in Multiline Mode connected? Possible values are `zigzag` and `snake`. Defaults to `snake`

config_entries.label: Flip X
config_entries.description: Flip the horizontal axis on the screen. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Intensity
config_entries.description: The intensity with which the MAX7219 should drive the outputs. Range is from `0`, least intense to `15` the brightest. Defaults to `15`.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use for rendering the content on the MAX7219. See [Rendering Lambda](https://esphome.io/components/display/max7219digit#display-max7219digit_lambda) for more information.

config_entries.label: Num Chip Lines
config_entries.description: Number of lines if you want to use the displays in Multiline Mode. Defaults to `1` Example: [https://github.com/esphome/esphome/pull/1622#issue-836179156](https://github.com/esphome/esphome/pull/1622#issue-836179156)

config_entries.label: Num Chips
config_entries.description: The number of chips you wish to use for daisy chaining. Defaults to `4`.

config_entries.label: Reverse Enable
config_entries.description: For some displays the order of the displays is reversed ("DCBA"). This option will reverse the display to ("ABCD") again. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Rotate Chip
config_entries.description: Rotates every 8x8 chip. Valid values are `0`, `90`, `180` and `270`. Defaults to `0`.

config_entries.label: Scroll Delay
config_entries.description: Set delay time before scroll starts. Defaults to `1s`.

config_entries.label: Scroll Dwell
config_entries.description: Sets the wait time at the end of the scroll before starting over. This is only used in mode `STOP`. Defaults to `1s`.

config_entries.label: Scroll Enable
config_entries.description: Turn scroll mode on when content does not fit. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Scroll Mode
config_entries.description: Set the scroll mode. One of `CONTINUOUS` or `STOP`. Defaults to `CONTINUOUS`

config_entries.label: Scroll Speed
config_entries.description: Set scroll speed. Defaults to `250ms`
